title: WorkspaceTemplate
description: Declarative workspace template — describes panes and their binary layout.

name.description: Human-readable template name shown in the command palette.

description.description: Optional longer description of what this template sets up.

version.description: Optional semver string for template versioning.

panes.description: Ordered list of pane definitions. Every id referenced in layout must appear here.

layout.description: Root layout node — either a leaf pane reference or a recursive split.

focus.description: Optional pane id that receives focus after the workspace opens.

id.description: Symbolic slot name; unique within the template.

command.description: Executable to launch (absolute path or PATH-resolvable name).

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the process.

cwd.description: Working directory for the process. Omit to inherit the application cwd.

env.description: Extra environment variables merged over the inherited environment.

paneLeaf.description: Leaf node — a reference to a pane defined in the panes array.

pane.description: Must match the id of exactly one entry in panes.

splitNode.description: Internal node — splits screen space between two children.

split.description: horizontal = children side-by-side; vertical = children stacked.

ratio.description: Fraction of space given to child a; b gets 1-ratio.
